title: order-by grouping set expressions resolution may have already been resolved to grouping column already
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
```
CREATE TABLE `t` (
  `year` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `country` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `product` varchar(32) DEFAULT NULL,
  `profit` int(11) DEFAULT NULL
) 
alter table t set tiflash replica 1;
SELECT year, country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY year, country, product with rollup order by grouping(year);
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
successfully

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
ERROR 3602 (HY000): Argument #0 of GROUPING function is not in GROUP BY

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
master
poc: alter table t set tiflash replica 1;
SELECT year, country, product, SUM(profit) AS profit FROM sales GROUP BY year, country, product with rollup order by grouping(year);
key_bug_features: GROUP BY with rollup and order by grouping function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `sales` ( `year` int(11) NOT NULL, `country` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `product` varchar(32) NOT NULL, `profit` int(11) DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY (`year`, `country`, `product`));
SELECT year, country, product, SUM(profit) AS total_profit FROM sales GROUP BY year, country, product WITH ROLLUP ORDER BY GROUPING(year), country;
CREATE TABLE `products` ( `product_id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `product_name` varchar(50) NOT NULL, `category` varchar(30), PRIMARY KEY (`product_id`));
